message:
feat(fcp-cbor): add benchmarks for canonical serialization

Add comprehensive benchmarks for CBOR hot path operations:
- Schema hash computation (type binding for content addressing)
- CanonicalSerializer::serialize with small/medium/large payloads
- CanonicalSerializer::deserialize (full schema + canonical check)
- CanonicalSerializer::deserialize_unchecked (schema only)
- to_canonical_cbor (raw deterministic encoding)

Includes throughput metrics for medium and large payloads to track
serialization/deserialization performance in bytes/sec.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,3 +18,10 @@ hex.workspace = true
 semver.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+criterion.workspace = true
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "cbor_benchmarks"
+harness = false
